name: e2
description: e2 studio (Renesas) live introspection + control bridge. Read everything (menus, command IDs, workbench state, builds, problems, launch configs, dialogs, debug runtime: PC/registers/memory/variables/expressions). Mutating ops (step/resume/breakpoint, memory/register write, launch run, expression eval, variable write, run-to-line, jump-to-line, watch add/remove) are gated behind /e2:danger on with TTL.
